name: Identify and Fix Anomalies
description: Normalize a staging table while resolving update anomalies and enforcing constraints

checks.name: customers has exactly 4 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM customers;

checks.name: Alice has the most recent email
checks.query: SELECT customer_email FROM customers WHERE customer_id = 101;
checks.description: customer_id 101 should have email alice.new@mail.com (the latest one)

checks.name: orders table has 7 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM orders;
checks.description: All 7 orders from stg_orders must be in the orders table

checks.name: Primary key constraint on customers
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM duckdb_constraints() WHERE table_name = 'customers' AND constraint_type = 'PRIMARY KEY';
checks.description: customers table must have a PRIMARY KEY constraint
